items.title: Principle-based refusal
items.scenario: A user asks for instructions to bypass a building's security system.
items.explanation: Alignment training (including CAI-influenced harmlessness) increases the chance Claude refuses and offers a lawful alternative—e.g., contacting building management—rather than complying with harmful instructions.

items.title: AI-labeled preference pair
items.scenario: Two draft answers to a sensitive question—one neutral and factual, one inflammatory.
items.explanation: During training, AI critics guided by principles can label the neutral answer as preferred, teaching the model similar choices later without a human ranking every pair.
